sentences.en: The gamification mechanics we added to the loyalty program boosted repeat purchases by 18%.
sentences.zh: 我们在忠诚度计划中添加的游戏化机制使复购率提升了18%。

sentences.en: We are running a multivariate test on the checkout page to optimize layout and copy.
sentences.zh: 我们正在对结账页面进行多变量测试，以优化布局和文案。

sentences.en: The cost per install on TikTok is half of what we pay on Facebook.
sentences.zh: TikTok上的单次安装成本是Facebook的一半。

sentences.en: Lifecycle marketing automation reduced manual campaign workload by 60%.
sentences.zh: 生命周期营销自动化将手动活动工作量减少了60%。

sentences.en: We should leverage user-generated content to build social proof at scale.
sentences.zh: 我们应该利用用户生成内容来大规模构建社会认同。

example.en: Gamification elements like badges and streaks increase daily active usage.
example.zh: 徽章和连续打卡等游戏化元素能增加日活使用。

example.en: A multivariate test lets you evaluate multiple variables simultaneously.
example.zh: 多变量测试让你可以同时评估多个变量。

example.en: Map the customer lifecycle to identify key intervention points.
example.zh: 绘制客户生命周期图以识别关键干预点。

example.en: Displaying download counts is a simple form of social proof.
example.zh: 展示下载量是一种简单的社会认同形式。

example.en: User-generated content feels more authentic than brand-produced material.
example.zh: 用户生成内容比品牌制作的素材更有真实感。

sentences.en: The watchlist feature has the highest stickiness score among all product modules.
sentences.zh: 自选股功能在所有产品模块中拥有最高的粘性评分。

sentences.en: We introduced a canary deployment strategy to catch issues before full rollout.
sentences.zh: 我们引入了金丝雀部署策略，以在全量上线前发现问题。

sentences.en: The heatmap analysis shows users are ignoring the call-to-action below the fold.
sentences.zh: 热力图分析显示用户忽略了首屏以下的行动号召按钮。

sentences.en: Product-market fit is validated when organic word-of-mouth drives meaningful growth.
sentences.zh: 当自发口碑驱动有意义的增长时，产品市场匹配就得到了验证。

sentences.en: We need to deprecate the old API version by end of Q3.
sentences.zh: 我们需要在Q3结束前弃用旧版API。

example.en: High stickiness means users keep coming back without being prompted.
example.zh: 高粘性意味着用户无需提示就会持续回访。

example.en: Canary deployment routes 5% of traffic to the new version first.
example.zh: 金丝雀部署先将5%的流量路由到新版本。

example.en: The heatmap revealed that most clicks happen in the top-left corner.
example.zh: 热力图显示大多数点击发生在左上角。

example.en: We will deprecate the legacy endpoint and migrate users to the new one.
example.zh: 我们将弃用旧端点并将用户迁移到新端点。

example.en: Word-of-mouth is the most trusted form of marketing.
example.zh: 口碑是最受信任的营销方式。

sentences.en: The company declared a special dividend after divesting its non-core subsidiary.
sentences.zh: 公司在剥离非核心子公司后宣布了特别股息。

sentences.en: The risk-adjusted return of the portfolio exceeded the benchmark index by 200 basis points.
sentences.zh: 投资组合的风险调整后收益超过基准指数200个基点。

sentences.en: Insider buying activity surged in the past two weeks, which is a bullish signal.
sentences.zh: 过去两周内部人士买入活动激增，这是一个看涨信号。

sentences.en: The capital expenditure forecast was revised upward to support data center expansion.
sentences.zh: 资本支出预测被上调以支持数据中心扩张。

sentences.en: The stock trades at a discount to intrinsic value based on our DCF model.
sentences.zh: 根据我们的DCF模型，该股票以低于内在价值的折价交易。

example.en: Divesting non-core assets allows the company to focus on its strengths.
example.zh: 剥离非核心资产使公司能专注于优势领域。

example.en: The central bank raised interest rates by 25 basis points.
example.zh: 央行加息25个基点。

example.en: The market turned bullish after strong employment data was released.
example.zh: 强劲的就业数据发布后市场转为看涨。

example.en: Capital expenditure on technology infrastructure doubled this year.
example.zh: 今年技术基础设施的资本支出翻了一番。

example.en: Warren Buffett focuses on buying stocks below their intrinsic value.
example.zh: 巴菲特专注于以低于内在价值的价格买入股票。

sentences.en: The key result for this quarter is to increase the employee engagement score by 10 points.
sentences.zh: 本季度的关键结果是将员工敬业度评分提高10分。

sentences.en: We are piloting a four-day workweek to see if it improves productivity.
sentences.zh: 我们正在试行四天工作制，看是否能提升生产力。

sentences.en: The hiring freeze has been lifted, so we can start backfilling the open positions.
sentences.zh: 招聘冻结已解除，我们可以开始回补空缺岗位。

sentences.en: I recommend using the RACI matrix to clarify roles in this cross-team initiative.
sentences.zh: 我建议使用RACI矩阵来明确这个跨团队项目中的角色。

sentences.en: The attrition rate in engineering is 22%, which is well above the company average.
sentences.zh: 工程团队的流失率为22%，远高于公司平均水平。

example.en: High attrition in key roles disrupts project continuity.
example.zh: 关键岗位的高流失率会打断项目连续性。

example.en: We need to backfill the senior designer role before the next sprint.
example.zh: 我们需要在下一个冲刺前回补高级设计师岗位。

example.en: We are piloting the new tool with one team before a company-wide rollout.
example.zh: 我们先在一个团队试点新工具，然后再全公司推广。

example.en: The RACI matrix prevents confusion about who makes the final call.
example.zh: RACI矩阵能防止对谁做最终决定产生困惑。

example.en: Each objective should have two to five measurable key results.
example.zh: 每个目标应该有两到五个可衡量的关键结果。

sentences.en: The second-mover advantage allows us to learn from competitors' mistakes.
sentences.zh: 后发优势让我们可以从竞争对手的错误中学习。

sentences.en: We are building a data-driven decision culture to reduce reliance on gut feeling.
sentences.zh: 我们正在构建数据驱动的决策文化，以减少对直觉的依赖。

sentences.en: The freemium model serves as our primary top-of-funnel acquisition engine.
sentences.zh: 免费增值模式是我们漏斗顶部的主要获客引擎。

sentences.en: Regulatory compliance in Hong Kong and Singapore requires different approaches.
sentences.zh: 香港和新加坡的合规要求需要不同的策略。

sentences.en: The platform lock-in effect increases switching costs for power users.
sentences.zh: 平台锁定效应增加了高频用户的转换成本。

example.en: The freemium tier attracts users who may later convert to paid plans.
example.zh: 免费增值层吸引的用户可能会后续转化为付费用户。

example.en: Compliance costs are a significant overhead for financial services firms.
example.zh: 合规成本是金融服务公司的重要管理费用。

example.en: High switching costs create a strong lock-in effect for the platform.
example.zh: 高转换成本为平台创造了强大的锁定效应。

example.en: Data should validate or challenge your gut feeling, not replace it entirely.
example.zh: 数据应该验证或挑战你的直觉，而非完全取代它。

example.en: Low switching costs mean customers can easily move to a competitor.
example.zh: 低转换成本意味着客户可以轻松转向竞争对手。
